# servicenow_widget_dependency (Data Source)

`servicenow_widget_dependency` data source can be used to retrieve information of a single Widget Dependency in ServiceNow by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing Widget Dependency in ServiceNow by name.
data "servicenow_widget_dependency" "example" {
  name = "MyExistingWidgetDependency"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the widget dependency.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `module` (String) The AngularJS module name for this dependency.
- `page_load` (Boolean) If set to 'true', this dependency is loaded on every page load.
- `scope` (String) Associates a resource to a specific application ID in ServiceNow.
